data.body: Corrected remediation record (supersedes the malformed preceding comment): the scanner command is exactly `ruff check --select C901 --exit-zero --output-format=json src/rebar` for both modes. Return codes 0 and 1 proceed only after valid C901 JSON is confirmed; return code 2 or greater is a scanner failure. The update-stale path reuses `rebar._store.fsutil.atomic_write`, with tests requiring unchanged target bytes and no leftover sibling temp file after injected write or replace failures. No production code was changed.
